title: Frontend Developer
description: I am a passionate frontend developer who has the desire to design and develop great-looking web applications which are satisfying & engaging to use! The tools I have used thus far to achieve this are HTML5, CSS3, Javascript and various APIs.

title: Open-minded Programmer
description: Throughout my education and work experience I have had the opportunity to gain experience in various programming languages and technologies. This has led me to always look for new challenges where I can showcase my skills and hopefully learn even more!

title: Avid Learner
description: What I enjoy most is acquiring knowledge and learning ways in which I can improve my work and myself. Therefore I am always on the look out for new technologies which I can put to good use to improve my projects! This allows me to adapt and be agile in my approach to work.

title: Aspiring React Developer
description: I am well-versed in HTML, CSS and Javascript. However, I am always looking to improve and gain knowledge! This is why I have spent time learning the React JS library on top of my existing Frontend experience. This also does not stop me from learning any other Frameworks in the future!
